name: BelieversFlow v2.0.1
body:
## ✝ BelieversFlow v2.0.1

**Rebuilt & Updated APK**

### What's New
- 🎨 **Vibrant new icon**: Purple gradient bg + glowing gold cross + sparkles
- ✝ **Emoji-enhanced app name**: ✝ BelieversFlow
- 📦 **Clean rebuild** from scratch for reliable installation
- ⚡ **Improved install compatibility** with preferExternal install location

### Features
- Task management with daily verses
- Prayer tracker with daily prompts
- Bible study planner with daily suggestions
- NLP AI assistant (GROQ mixtral-8x7b-32768)
- Glassmorphism UI with purple/gold theme
- Offline-first with localStorage

### Installation
1. Download the APK below
2. Open it on your Android device
3. Enable "Install from unknown sources" if prompted
4. Tap Install

### Download
[believersguidelite.apk](https://github.com/ecoinboxhub/Christian_task_manager/releases/download/v2.0.0/believersguidelite.apk) (3.6 MB)
